history.outputPreview:
## API Endpoints from the Zerith-Isle/TechToolbox Repository

I was able to access the GitHub repository at `Zerith-Isle/TechToolbox` (the correct owner, not `techtoolbox`). Here are some examples of API endpoints I can access:

### Repository Info
- `https://api.github.com/repos/Zerith-Isle/TechToolbox` - basic repo metadata
- `https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=TechToolbox` - search results (15 total)

### Contents
- `https://api.github.com/repos/Zerith-Isle/TechToolbox/contents/` - root directory listing

### Individual Files Found
The repo contains these HTML files:
- `bmi.html`
- `calculator.html`
- `chat.html`
- `converter.html`
- `encrypt.html`
- `finance.html`
- `fitness.html`
- `index.html`
- `password.html`
- `timestamp.html`
- `todo.html`

### Static Assets Directory
- `https://api.github.com/repos/Zerith-Isle/TechToolbox/contents/static?ref=main` - contains subdirectories:
  - `css/` (with `style.css`)
  - `js/` (with `app.js`, `bmi.js`, `calculator.js`, `chat.js`, `converter.js`, `encrypt.js`, `finance.js`, `fitness.js`, `password.js`, `timestamp.js`, `todo.js`)

### Git Trees
- `https://api.github.com/repos/Zerith-Isle/TechToolbox/git/trees/main?recursive=1` - full recursive tree listing

Note: The repo is a static HTML/JS project (no backend API), so the "API endpoints" are all GitHub REST API endpoints for reading the repository contents.
